author: SantiMod
content:
Why are space pirates afraid to bring up “Star Atlas”? 
 
Because they always get stuck at the stARRRRRRRRRRR! 🏴‍☠‍
 
As lawless renegades whose asteroid coves bear a striking resemblance to the Caribbean, few spacefarers can say that they truly see aye to aye with them…
